scores.correctness_notes: Core API usage is correct (event.relation.data[unit], event.unit, event.relation.units), but misses the Relation.load alternative shown in gold standard, and uses event.app instead of event.relation.app for remote app databag access.
scores.hallucination_notes: @charm.on.relation_changed.emit is a fabricated decorator — ops handlers are registered via self.framework.observe() in __init__, not with a decorator like this. Everything else is accurate.
